feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Recently am working in delivery note form, where we need to convert item delivered into some quantities, I have explored all badi available in public cloud for delivery item. I have checked using custom tracing, no badi is triggering .while executing "display outbound delivery" . Can you suggest if any BADI available for item level in outbound delivery.

Please note, I have added BADI for header level.(LE_SHP_MODIFY_HEAD)

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: How can we view the status of the database and backup status in Grow with SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to check the database size, database version, and backup status, but we are unable to find any Fiori app to retrieve this information. Could you please suggest how we can view the database status?

entry.title: How to manually import Customer/Supplier invoice
entry.content:
Is there any way to manually create 'Accounts receivable/payable open item items' from other apps (rather than using 'Migrate Your Data' application)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S4HANA Public Cloud - CBO Upsert Error 'Expected type is 'Edm.Boolean''
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm trying an upsert to a custom CBO but the expected types are sort of strange.

 

It does not accept the values a GET request response.
Also numeric is not accepted as '1.00' but 1.00m

Example for the error:

https://xxxx/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_API_TEST_CDS/YY1_API_TESTSap_upsert?NumericID='0000000001'&SAP_Description='API-Test'&Amount_V=2.00m&Amount_C='Amount_C'&TextToChange='AV'&Quantity_V=9.99m&Quantity_U='G'&CheckBox=true

CheckBox = true is not considered as boolean, nor is 'true' or 'X' or 1 or whatever.

Has anyone solved this?

entry.title: Aging Report for Accounts Payable not working
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are encountering an issue when attempting to open the Aging Report for Accounts Payable app. The following error message appears:

"It seems that your profile is not configured for the system.
Contact your system administrator or end the current session and try again later.
Notify the system administrator
End session"

Despite having the necessary role assigned, we are still unable to access the app. Could you please advise on the possible cause of this issue and any recommended steps for resolution?

Thank you for your support.

entry.title: Massive add of language key in gl account SAP PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
hi community,

is there any possible way for a mass modification of g/l account translation so i can add language key in french for public cloud.

thanks in advance 😄

entry.title: Unable to create New storage type with template- Default storage type
entry.content:
Unable to create New storage type with template- Default storage type 

OR

Change the Storage Type Template in CBC


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Digital manufacturing Product Master Data Transfer
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have set up an integration between a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition # system and aSAP Digital Manufacturing #system. All according to thisSAP Digital Manufacturing for execution Integration | SAP Help Portal guide. The integration scenarios seem to be working correctly and we have been able to send over multiple production orders and Master Data objects such as routings and work centers and . However with the transfer of products/materials we run into a problem.

To run the master data transfer scenario we used the app "Replicate by Object Selection" in the public cloud system. All the transfer that we have done were going great on the Public Cloud/outbound side. However on the DM/Inbound side we ran into problems. The first problem that we had was that the transfer was successful, on the "Integration Message Dashboard" app in DM, the transfer was logged as complete. However we could not find the product in our manage materials app. We read somewhere that this might be due to the plant having a different name in DM than in the PC system. So we made another Plant in DM and gave it the same name. After we had done that the "integration Message Board"(DM) no longer game the message Completed after we ran the  "Replicate by Object Selection" (PC) job. Instead it gave the

Error Detail: Error on creation of master data objects. The full responds Payload is at the end of this message.
Does anyone have a clue on how to solve this problem or where the error might come from>
 
With kind regards,
Robin van Buiten
 
 
Responds Payload:
{
"errorCode": "masterData.download.fail",
"message": "com.sap.dme.exception.ApiServiceException",
"messageI18nKey": "request.masterData.error",
"messageInEnglish": "Error on creation of master data objects",
"errorLocation": "INTERNAL_SYSTEM_ERROR",
"serviceName": "dme-product-ms",
"eventType": "sap.dsc.dm.Material.Received.v1"
}

entry.title: Join two Custom Analytical Queries in a single Query
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We need a solution to combine two Custom Analytical Queries into a single query to generate the required report for our organization.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to create new Unit of Measure in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Hello,

I have tried to add a new UoM in S/4HANA public cloud using the Custom Fields and Logic app and was not able to add an alternative unit of measure.

It seems like things have changed since the 2302 release and the Custom fields and logic app is now split in two.
When using the custom fields app I click Create, but there is no option for UoM.

How is this done in the 2502 release?

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.content:
Hi PERSON_NAME,
I have maintained the Fiscal year DIGITS for continue document number ranges but still is picking up DIGITS Fiscal number ranges.
How we can delete or removed Old fiscal year number ranges.
please see the screen shot.
Thanks 
Rakesh PERSON_NAME

entry.title: CO-object Error on Asset Retirement with revenue
entry.content:
Hi Expert

We are facing the issue while trying to retire an asset with revenue from books. The issue is coming that system asking CO-Object while the same already been assigned with asset master and the same in showing at time of simulating the entry but still showing the error. Please arrange to check and guide us where the gap is.

entry.title: Importing FSV to Cutomizing environment
entry.content:
On SAP S4C , I need to create an FSV identical to one from another project. Is there a way to copy or import it into the new system (Cutomizing environment) without having to recreate it manually via an external file?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: BADI for Delivery note(item)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently, I am working in delivery note form. I have explored all badi that available in item lavel. But when am trying to trace the custom logic, I dont see any BADI triggering for item Lavel.

Do we have any other BADI available to change/modify item lavel.

Please note, I have implemented both header and item lavel BADI, but only header lavel BADI is triggering, no item lavel BADI is triggering in this case.

Let me know, if i need to try other business context.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to perform a reversal for a stored material in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
In the SAP Public Cloud system, a goods receipt for serialized materials was posted to the WM warehouse upon receiving the delivery. However, since the serialized materials were previously stored under a different warehouse number in WM stock, the ERP goods receipt could not be completed despite the WM goods receipt being finalized. As a result, there is a stock inconsistency between WM and ERP.

How can a reversal process be performed for a material that has completed the WM goods receipt and has been stored at its final destination?

entry.title: Purchase order price enhancement in S4 hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am currently trying to do an enhancement for PO price in S4 hana public cloud system, I don't find a appropriate BADI for price enhancement. Then I considered to put a routine in "purchasing price calculation schema", but I cannot find where to define the routine for purchasing price. 

Currently I assigned a "Routine" in the "Requirement" field, but based on the testing, this is not useful for PO.

 

Maybe because this Routine was defined under SD module, I defined the "Routine" and "Assigned the Enhancement ID to routine" in below path, based on the testing, it only works for SO.

Could you please help if you know how can I activate this enhancement to PO?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Mass uploader for stock correction
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a requirement of having a uploader where the users can upload the excel file and the system can do the stock correction according to each line.

Anyone know what would be the ideal way to approach this requirement?

entry.title: How to see the PR history I approved?
entry.content:
Dear sap,

I want know where can I check the PR lists I approved before? Because in "My Inbox" app, I can only see the PR waiting my approval. but can't see any history I approved.

Thanks

entry.title: #COE#RFL01-Some SSCUI are displayed in Quality and not in Production
entry.content:
Dear All, 

We're still discovering SCCUIs that are displayed and accessible in quality by the App  Manage your solution, but that can't be seen in manage your solution in production.

For example the SSCUI 100066 we can display the SSCUI with the app manage your solution in quality system, BUT we can not display the SSCUI with the app manage your solution in Production system. 

Does anyone know how can we have a complete list of SSCUI that are visible in Qual and not in prod, so that we don't have to check roles every time? 

I've searched for notes and haven't found any answer to this question.

Thank you very much for your help. 

Best regards, 

Mouna

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance
